purpose: Stratified aging report showing un-invoiced WIP by age bucket. Critical financial-discipline metric — the longer parts/labor sit on an open WO, the more cash the dealer is floating, and the higher the risk of margin loss. Standard buckets: Current (0-30 days), 31-60, 61-90, 91-120, Over 120.
gap_notes: No WIP aging materialized view. Without it the service manager cannot prioritize old-WO close-out — the largest single source of margin leak in service.
migration_hint_first_sql: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_service_wip_aging AS SELECT j.workspace_id, j.branch_id, CASE WHEN now() - j.created_at < INTERVAL '30 days' THEN 'current' WHEN now() - j.created_at < INTERVAL '60 days' THEN 'd31_60' WHEN now() - j.created_at < INTERVAL '90 days' THEN 'd61_90' WHEN now() - j.created_at < INTERVAL '120 days' THEN 'd91_120' ELSE 'over_120' END AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS wo_count, SUM(wip.wip_value_cents) AS total_wip_cents FROM service_jobs j JOIN mv_service_jobs_wip wip ON wip.id = j.id WHERE j.closed_at IS NULL GROUP BY j.workspace_id, j.branch_id, bucket

migration_hint_first_sql: CREATE TABLE public.rental_invoices ( id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), workspace_id UUID NOT NULL, rental_contract_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES public.rental_contracts(id), invoice_number TEXT NOT NULL, invoice_date DATE NOT NULL, period_start DATE NOT NULL, period_end DATE NOT NULL, rental_subtotal NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, damage_waiver_amount NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, delivery_charge NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, pickup_charge NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, fuel_charge NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, cleaning_charge NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, damage_charge NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, hours_overage_charge NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, rpo_credit_applied NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, deposit_applied NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, tax_amount NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, total NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, balance_due NUMERIC(14,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT 0, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft', reversed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, reversed_by UUID REFERENCES public.profiles(id), reversal_reason TEXT, reversal_credit_memo_id UUID, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now() )

purpose: Standard 30/60/90/120+ aging buckets per customer with click-through to line-level outstanding detail. Backbone of cash collection.
gap_notes: No AR sub-ledger and no aging materialized view in QEP today. Required for Owner Cockpit collections cell.
migration_hint_first_sql: -- Pre-req: AR invoice + payment tables. Then: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW mv_customer_ar_aging AS SELECT i.workspace_id, i.company_id, SUM(CASE WHEN due_date >= CURRENT_DATE THEN balance_cents ELSE 0 END) AS current_cents, SUM(CASE WHEN due_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '30 days' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day' THEN balance_cents ELSE 0 END) AS d30_cents, SUM(CASE WHEN due_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '60 days' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '31 days' THEN balance_cents ELSE 0 END) AS d60_cents, SUM(CASE WHEN due_date BETWEEN CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' AND CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '61 days' THEN balance_cents ELSE 0 END) AS d90_cents, SUM(CASE WHEN due_date < CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '90 days' THEN balance_cents ELSE 0 END) AS d120plus_cents FROM /* invoices */ i WHERE i.balance_cents > 0 GROUP BY i.workspace_id, i.company_id

purpose: Aggregated dispatch grid showing each tech's week (Tue-Mon), with per-day "scheduled / available" hours and a stacked block per WO (label = customer + machine + hours, color = warranty/ internal/customer-pay). Dispatcher's primary planning surface.
gap_notes: Underlying data exists (service_jobs.scheduled_start_at, .technician_id) but no aggregated grid view + UI. Need a query that materializes the per-tech-per-day rollup.
migration_hint_first_sql: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_tech_daily_capacity AS SELECT t.user_id AS technician_id, d.day::date AS day, (t.weekly_schedule ->> trim(both '"' from to_char(d.day, '"dy"')))::numeric AS available_hours, COALESCE(SUM(s.estimated_hours), 0) AS scheduled_hours, jsonb_agg(jsonb_build_object( 'service_job_id', j.id, 'wo_number', j.wo_number, 'customer', c.name, 'type', s.type, 'estimated_hours', s.estimated_hours )) FILTER (WHERE j.id IS NOT NULL) AS scheduled_jobs FROM technician_profiles t CROSS JOIN generate_series(now()::date - 7, now()::date + 7, '1 day') AS d(day) LEFT JOIN service_jobs j ON j.technician_id = t.user_id AND j.scheduled_start_at::date = d.day LEFT JOIN service_job_segments s ON s.service_job_id = j.id LEFT JOIN qrm_companies c ON c.id = j.customer_id GROUP BY t.user_id, d.day, t.weekly_schedule
